nodes.name: Sheets: Check Duplicate
nodes.notes: Lookup jobId = messageId. If row exists, stop.

nodes.name: HTTP: Upload to Google Drive
nodes.notes: Upload processed image to Google Drive. Use Drive node instead if credentials are configured.

nodes.name: Code: Build Public Drive URL
nodes.notes: After upload, set file permission to public via Drive API, then construct URL

nodes.name: HTTP: Gemini Vision Analysis
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: Replace inlineData.data with actual base64 image data. Use a Code node before this to build the parts array dynamically from binary data.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "phone": "{{ $('Code: Parse Gemini Response').item.json.phone }}",
  "message": "✅ *Peça identificada!*

*{{ $('Code: Parse Gemini Response').item.json.title }}*

Preço sugerido: *R$ {{ $('Code: Parse Gemini Response').item.json.suggestedPrice }}*

Responda com o preço desejado (ex: _350_) ou envie *ok* para confirmar o preço sugerido.

🔗 Revisar no dashboard: {{ $env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL }}/job/{{ $('Code: Parse Gemini Response').item.json.jobId }}"
}

nodes.name: Wait: Price Approval
nodes.notes: Pauses execution. Resume URL is automatically available as $execution.resumeUrl (already written to Sheets). Resumes when /api/approve or wf-whatsapp-resume POSTs to the resume URL.
